name: Down-Home Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion and cook, stirring, for 3 minutes or until soft.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except ribs; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring often, for 20 minutes.
5. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Place ribs in a single layer in two baking pans.
7. Bake for 1 1/2 hours or until tender. Drain and discard drippings from pans.
8. Spread half of the barbecue sauce evenly over ribs.
9. Reduce heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Bake ribs for 15 minutes.
11. Turn ribs and brush with remaining sauce.
12. Bake for another 15 minutes.
13. Serve!
